# PERF-197 negative: body is read once and cached
lang: go
file: PERF-197-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	r.Body = http.MaxBytesReader(w, r.Body, 1<<20)
	defer r.Body.Close()
	body := []byte("ok")
	w.Header().Set("Content-Length", strconv.Itoa(len(body)))
	_, _ = w.Write(body)
}
